name: First Fight
description: Makino says the village has been bothered by bandits near the road. Prove you can handle yourself.
start_dialogue: Makino smiles. 'Start small. Defeat one bandit and come back safe.'
complete_dialogue: Makino nods proudly. 'You handled yourself well. Maybe you really are ready for the sea.'

name: Dock Cleanup
description: The harbor master wants thieves cleared away from the docks.
start_dialogue: The harbor master points toward the pier. 'Two thieves. Handle them and I'll pay you.'
complete_dialogue: 'Clean work. The docks are safer now.'

name: Boar Problem
description: Wild boars have been charging travelers outside the village.
start_dialogue: A villager sighs. 'Those boars are tearing up the road again. Could you thin them out?'
complete_dialogue: 'Finally, people can travel without getting launched into a bush.'

name: Pirate Pressure
description: Local pirates are testing the town's defenses. Push them back.
start_dialogue: A worried guard lowers his voice. 'They're getting bold. Take out three of them.'
complete_dialogue: 'That should make them think twice before walking into our town again.'

name: Marine Drill
description: Spar with rookie Marines to sharpen your fundamentals.
start_dialogue: The drill instructor grins. 'Let's see if you're more than talk.'
complete_dialogue: 'Not bad. Your form still needs work, but you've got grit.'
